conditions.name: Heart Attack
conditions.explanation: Chest pressure with left arm pain is classic heart attack presentation

conditions.name: Angina
conditions.explanation: Could be reduced blood flow to heart causing temporary pain

data.action: Call emergency services (115) immediately and chew an aspirin if available.
home_tips: Sit or lie down and try to stay calm
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
